name: Scrumptious Strawberry Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Puree 1 1/2 cups of berries in a blender or food processor.
2. Combine sugar and tapioca, blending well with a fork.
3. Stir the mixture into the pureed berries.
4. Add 1/2 cup water; blend well.
5. Microwave on HIGH for 2 minutes.
6. Stir with a fork or wire whisk.
7. Microwave for an additional 2 minutes or until thick.
8. Stir to smooth.
9. Arrange remaining berries in the bottom of the baked, cooled pie shell.
10. Spoon or pour sauce over fresh strawberries.
11. Chill and serve with whipped cream.
